response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and diverse experience across architectures and languages, but lacks explicit leadership experience in IT consulting, formal project management, and UML expertise — and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven full-stack and cross-platform development experience across multiple languages and environments
Strong track record of mentoring, workshops, and community knowledge-sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting the required C1 level
No clear evidence of architectural leadership, UML modeling, or IT consulting project oversight
Lacks explicit experience in risk management, compliance, or client-facing technical advisory roles
